nasb.text: Only no accounting shall be made with them for the money delivered into their hands, for they deal faithfully.”

esv.text: But no accounting shall be asked from them for the money that is delivered into their hand, for they deal honestly.”

cnv.text: 銀子交在他們手中，不用和他們算帳，因為他們辦事誠實。”

ccb.text: 你不用查核他们的账目，因为他们都是忠诚可靠的人。”
